image_handling.name: image_handling
image_handling.description: What to do with inline images in HTML content. Defaults to `convert_to_links`.

your_note.description: Private note about this user written by you. Only returned when include_your=true.

your_follow.description: Your follow state for this user. Only returned when include_your=true.

accepted.description: Whether your follow request has been accepted by the community.

pending_moderation_actions.description: Number of pending flags sent to this community. Present with include_your=true if you are a moderator

content_text.description: Content in text form. Should be displayed if content_html is not present.

replies.description: If null, there are replies to this comment but are omitted due to depth limits. Otherwise, this contains a list of replies. If next_page is not null, some replies have been omitted and can be accessed with pagination.

YourVote.description: Null when you have not voted. When present, federation_status may describe delivery of a local vote to a remote target.

FederationStatus.description: Local action delivery state for remote targets. Private messages currently report unsent, sent, or received; public objects may also report posted after readback confirmation.

accepted.description: Whether the follow has been accepted by the target actor.

in_reply_to.description: Local private message id when the message is a reply in a local conversation thread.

PrivateMessageCreate.description: At least one content field must be supplied. content_markdown is rendered to content_text and content_html by the server.

with_user.description: The other participant in the conversation to hide until newer activity arrives.

unseen.description: Whether this notification was generated since the last time notifications were checked.

ThingLocalRef.description: Local reference returned after resolving or ingesting a remote ActivityPub object.

bearer.description: Token passed in Authorization header as Bearer

get.summary: Look up a remote actor by WebFinger or ActivityPub ID

next_page.description: This is actually always null since it only appears when there are no replies.

replies.description: This endpoint no longer includes replies. However, if there are no replies, this will be non-null and items will be an empty array.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Number of levels to expand replies for. Defaults to 3.

delete.summary: Retract a like of a comment

parameters.name: include_your
parameters.description: If true, will include `you_are_moderator` and `your_follow` in list. Requires login.

parameters.name: your_follow.accepted
parameters.description: Filter to either communities you are following or waiting to follow. Requires login.

parameters.name: you_are_moderator
parameters.description: Filter based on whether you are a moderator of the community. Requires login.

parameters.name: local
parameters.description: Filter to either local or remote communities.

try_wait_for_accept.description: If true, will wait before responding to give the remote server time to accept the follow

put.summary: Add a moderator to a community

delete.summary: Remove a moderator from a community

waiting.description: Number of connections currently in use

parameters.name: dismissed
parameters.description: Filter by whether the flag is dismissed for the target. Requires exactly one target filter.

get.summary: Check validity of a password reset key

404.description: No such key, or is expired.

post.summary: Reset a password using a password reset key

web_push_vapid_key.description: Reserved for legacy browser push clients. Current builds return an empty string because browser push delivery is disabled.

post.description: Uploads an image as hosted media. File content must be sent as the request body.

parameters.name: in_any_local_community
parameters.description: Filter by whether the post is approved in a local community

parameters.name: use_aggregate_filters
parameters.description: If true, will omit posts from communities marked as hide_posts_from_aggregates

parameters.name: community
parameters.description: If present, will filter to posts approved in the specified community

parameters.name: in_your_follows
parameters.description: Filter by whether the post is approved in one of the communities you follow

parameters.name: created_within
parameters.description: How far into the past to include posts from, as an ISO8601 duration.

parameters.name: sort_sticky
parameters.description: If true, will sort sticky posts to the top

href.description: URL target for the post. Can be set to a hosted media file by specifying `local-media://<id>`

multiple.description: Whether voters can choose multiple options

options.description: The available options in the poll

closed_in.description: How long until the poll should close, as an ISO8601 duration.

multiple.description: Whether voters can choose multiple options

closed_at.description: The time when this poll has or will close.

delete.summary: Retract a like of a post

get.summary: Find a local user by username

parameters.name: local
parameters.description: Filter by whether the user is local. Currently required to be true.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Filter by the user's name

login.description: If true, will also create a login token for the new user

parameters.name: include_your
parameters.description: If true, will fetch your_note

post.description: Creates a local person follow and delivers a signed ActivityPub Follow when the target user is remote.

try_wait_for_accept.description: If true, briefly waits before responding to give the remote server time to send an Accept.

get.summary: List private messages for the current user
get.description: When conversations=true and with_user is omitted, returns the latest visible message for each conversation partner. Otherwise returns private messages in reverse chronological order, optionally filtered to one participant.

parameters.name: with_user
parameters.description: Only include messages exchanged with this user id.

parameters.name: conversations
parameters.description: Return one latest message per visible conversation partner. Ignored when with_user is supplied.

post.description: Stores a local private message. For remote recipients, queues signed ActivityPub delivery using Note or ChatMessage depending on the conversation shape.
Hides a conversation from the conversation-summary list until a newer message arrives. Messages are not deleted.

get.summary: List content posted by a user

post.description: Removes a local person follow and queues a signed ActivityPub Undo when the target user is remote.

put.summary: Edit your personal note for a user

avatar.description: User profile image. Must be a `local-media://` link

get.summary: Fetch your notifications. Will also clear `has_unread_notifications`.

post.description: Browser push delivery is disabled in this build. The route is kept as a compatibility stub for older clients.

501.description: Browser push notifications are not available in this build

get.summary: Look up a remote ActivityPub object by WebFinger or ActivityPub ID
get.description: Fetches and ingests a remote actor, post, comment, or source-like collection target, then returns local references created or found from that object.

parameters.name: remoteID
parameters.description: WebFinger handle or ActivityPub object URL. URL values must be percent-encoded as a path segment.

put.summary: Block and purge a remote ActivityPub object
put.description: Site-admin endpoint used by Hitide to block a remote AP ID and remove local rows tied to that exact object.

parameters.name: remoteID
parameters.description: WebFinger handle or ActivityPub object URL. URL values must be percent-encoded as a path segment.

post.summary: Unfollow followed remote communities with no known posts

get.description: Collection targets cover federated sources that are not normal group actors, such as Funkwhale libraries and other source/catalog style feeds.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search names, AP IDs, owner AP IDs, software labels, hosts, and latest preview item titles.

parameters.name: include_your
parameters.description: Include follow status for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum returned rows. The backend clamps this to 1 through 150.

parameters.name: software
parameters.description: Optional software/source family filter.

get.summary: Fetch a source-like ActivityPub collection target
Fetch one cached item from a source-like ActivityPub collection target

post.summary: Reply to one cached item from a source-like ActivityPub collection target

put.summary: Like one cached item from a source-like ActivityPub collection target

delete.summary: Remove a Like from one cached item from a source-like ActivityPub collection target

post.summary: Follow a source-like ActivityPub collection target

try_wait_for_accept.description: Briefly wait before responding to give the remote server time to send an Accept.

post.summary: Unfollow a source-like ActivityPub collection target

get.summary: Fetch federation health and discovery diagnostics

post.summary: Retry a replayable failed federation task

302.description: Configured logo is an external URL.

get.summary: Fetch or redirect to a user avatar

302.description: The avatar is an external URL.

404.description: No avatar is configured for the user.

get.summary: List private messages for the current user
get.description: When conversations=true and with_user is omitted, returns the latest visible message for each conversation partner. Otherwise returns private messages in reverse chronological order, optionally filtered to one participant.

parameters.name: with_user
parameters.description: Only include messages exchanged with this user id.

parameters.name: conversations
parameters.description: Return one latest message per visible conversation partner. Ignored when with_user is supplied.

post.description: Stores a local private message. For remote recipients, queues signed ActivityPub delivery using Note or ChatMessage depending on the conversation shape.
Hides a conversation from the conversation-summary list until a newer message arrives. Messages are not deleted.
